description: The Chinook music store database is open in LibreOffice Base. Provision usernames for all customers in the 'Customer' table by adding a new VARCHAR column named 'Username'. Populate this column for all records by extracting the text before the '@' symbol from the 'Email' field and converting it to lowercase (e.g., 'Bjorn.Hansen@google.com' becomes 'bjorn.hansen'). Save the changes to the database.
